name: Butterscotch Biscuits (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Grease a baking sheet.
3. Melt the sugar, margarine, and vanilla essence together in a saucepan over low heat, stirring gently until combined. Remove from heat.
4. Allow mixture to cool slightly. In a large bowl, sift flour and salt. Make a well in the center and pour in the cooled egg/fat/sugar mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Roll out dough on a floured surface to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut into biscuits using a 2-inch biscuit cutter. Place on prepared baking sheet with space between each biscuit.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
